MERCHANTS.NoCharacter: No assigned character. Ask the GM to assign you a character, or open the shop as the GM.
MERCHANTS.MerchantDisabled: This merchant is not open to players.
MERCHANTS.ErrorItemMissing: That item is no longer available.
MERCHANTS.ErrorNotAllowed: You cannot buy for that character.
MERCHANTS.ErrorNoBuyer: Select a buyer with an assigned character or pick a character as the GM.
MERCHANTS.ErrorNoGm: The GM must be connected to process purchases.
MERCHANTS.ErrorTimeout: Purchase timed out. Is the GM connected?
MERCHANTS.ActorNotFound: That actor could not be found.
MERCHANTS.DefaultPriceHint: Default price (gp) when an item has no custom price flag.
MERCHANTS.EnabledHint: When enabled, players can open this actor's shop.
MERCHANTS.WelcomeHint: Shown at the top of the shop window.
